assertions.description: Relative rgb() syntax accepts currentcolor as the origin color.
assertions.test: color: rgb(from currentcolor r g b)

assertions.description: Relative oklab() syntax accepts currentcolor as the origin color.
assertions.test: color: oklab(from currentcolor l a b)

assertions.description: Relative colors using currentcolor are accepted on background-color.
assertions.test: background-color: rgb(from currentcolor r g b)

assertions.description: A border color derived from currentcolor resolves to the element text color.
assertions.test: (()=>{const e=document.createElement('div');e.style.color='rgb(10, 20, 30)';e.style.border='1px solid';e.style.borderColor='rgb(from currentcolor r g b)';document.body.append(e);const value=getComputedStyle(e).borderTopColor;e.remove();return value==='rgb(10, 20, 30)'||value==='color(srgb 0.0392157 0.0784314 0.117647)';})()

assertions.description: CSSOM accepts a relative color declaration using currentcolor.
